identity_baseline: A bloodthirsty community of green-skinned Martians.
origin_or_historical_context: Inhabitants of a ruined, ancient city.
stable_visual_summary: A bloodthirsty horde of green-skinned Martians characterized by an aggressive, tribal, or gladiatorial aesthetic. They inhabit a ruined ancient city and present as a collective of warriors.
continuity_constraints: Aesthetic must remain consistent with tribal or gladiatorial themes.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific physical proportions and body types of individual members.
Exact age range of the population.
